obs: Started collecting vintage cameras 3 months ago; currently has 5 cameras. Stores in dedicated room called "nerd cave" with display cases, archival-quality storage.
Maintains temperature 65-70°F, humidity 40-50%, uses UV-filtering glass, LED lighting. Cleans cameras every 2-3 months.
Plans to expand collection to include 1940s/1950s cameras. Researched finding rare models via eBay, forums, estates.
Stores vinyl records upright in protective sleeves, at temperature 60-70°F, humidity below 60%. Uses archival-quality materials for posters with acid-free mats.
Recently reorganized board game collection: 27 games. Frequently plays Ticket to Ride. Looking for storage/organization solutions.
Saw Forbidden Sky demo at board game convention; pre-ordering. Planning game night with friends. Interested in Board Game Geek community.
Met woman on bus who recommended Celeste Ng's "Our Missing Hearts." Planning to read it. Likes "Everything I Never Told You" and "Little Fires Everywhere" by Ng.
Tracking progress toward Gold level on Starbucks Rewards app. Needs 125 stars to reach Gold; earns 2-3 stars per $1 spent via app.
Making DIY cleaning products with baking soda, vinegar. Switched to refillable soap containers since mid-January. Reduced chemical-based product reliance.
Uses: Seventh Generation, Ecover, Dr. Bronner's, Method, Mrs. Meyer's. Interested in eco-friendly laundry detergent and skincare products.
Experimenting with DIY skincare using honey, avocado, oatmeal. Created face masks and scrubs at home.
Met grocery store worker; promised to visit his restaurant soon. Interested in using restaurant review sites: Yelp, TripAdvisor, Google Reviews, social media.
Finished "The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People," loved it. Interested in: "Mindset," "Power of Now," "Daring Greatly," "5 AM Club."
Currently reading "The Power" by Naomi Alderman. Interested in fiction exploring power dynamics. Read "Handmaid's Tale" and "Station Eleven."
Read all three books in N.K. Jemisin's Broken Earth trilogy: "Fifth Season," "Obelisk Gate," "Stone Sky." Interested in orogenes and world-building.
Attended private tour of Modern Art Museum's new contemporary exhibit on January 22. Impressed by scale, creativity. Interested in Immersion/Experiential Art.
Planning to visit High Museum of Art in Atlanta for Yayoi Kusama Infinity Rooms (February 12-May 2, 2023). Interested in guided tours.
Usually makes pancakes or scrambled eggs with toast on weekends. Wants to try Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs, Smoked Salmon Bagels.
Prefers challah bread for Avocado Toast: soft, fluffy interior, slightly sweet flavor. Can prep components ahead (toast, mash avocado, poach eggs).
Meal preps on Sundays to save weekday time. Considering smoothie bowls and breakfast burritos as new options.
Has giant tub of Greek yogurt from Costco, been there for weeks, needs to use up. Making parfaits, smoothies with fresh berries, granola.
Bought fresh strawberries from Walmart. Washing, storing in container in fridge. Shelf life 3-7 days; uses within week.
Has bulk almonds from Costco. Oven-toasting at 350°F for 10-12 minutes. Stores toasted almonds in airtight container for up to 2 weeks, or freezer up to 6 months.
Recently discovered great-grandmother was born in Amsterdam. Interested in exploring roots.
Exploring Philippine citizenship eligibility. Has Filipino ancestry. Learned Philippine government recognizes dual citizenship.
Attended cultural event last month; met someone from Bangladesh. Discussed expat experiences, language barriers. Learned basic Bengali phrases.
Improving Spanish skills by watching TV shows with English subtitles. Started language exchange with friend from Spain. Wants to learn Tagalog.
Started reflecting on dating history today. Dated more males than females but had significant relationships with females. Prioritizes emotional connection and shared values over gender.
Just arrived in Tokyo today; shocked by crowds. Living in Shimokitazawa, working in Shibuya. Commute: 20-25 min via Odakyu Line + JR Yamanote Line.
Researched ramen shops in Shibuya: Ichiran, Totto Ramen, Shina Sobaya, Ramen Nagi, Afuri. Looking for quiet cafes in Shimokitazawa.
Learning essential Japanese phrases for commuting, shopping: "Sumimasen," "Arigatou," "Arigatou gozaimasu." Using Google Maps, Hyperdia for transit.
Recently married, changed last name. Applied for passport name change on January 25. Updating online accounts: Amazon, Facebook, LinkedIn, credit cards.
Using Notion to organize film journal. Attended three film festivals in past two months. Met director Rachel ("Echoes") and cinematographer John Smith at festivals.
Logging film watching history in spreadsheet with columns: Title, Director, Year, Watch Date, Rating (1-5), Notes. Planning to analyze festival preferences.
Member of Page & Co. Booklover's Rewards since August last year. Earns 10 points per dollar. Accumulated 450 points; redeemed 200 for $10 gift card last month.
Tracking 6 loyalty programs: The Daily Grind, FreshMart, H&M Member, Page & Co., ASOS A-List, FitZone FitRewards. Wants spreadsheet to track points/rewards.
Gets free coffee every 5th purchase at coffee shop near bus stop. Needs 50 more points at The Daily Grind for free drink reward.
Listening to audiobooks on daily bus ride. Just finished "The Nightingale" by Kristin Hannah. Interested in "The Alice Network" by Kate Quinn (17.5 hrs, narrator Saskia Maarleveld).

Considering buying bike to cycle to work instead of bus. Planning to test ride bikes this weekend. Interested in exercise, cost savings.
Getting back into yoga. Old mat worn out. Located in downtown Manhattan (zip 10021). Interested in: Yoga to the People, Bikram Yoga NYC, CorePower Yoga.
Wants 4-5 mm thick yoga mat for Hatha and Vinyasa. Considering eco-friendly, non-slip options: Manduka eKO, Jade Yoga, Gaiam, Aurorae, Hugger Mugger.
Interested in succulent plants for living room decoration. Wants indoor-suitable species: Echeverias, Haworthias, Jade plants, Zebra cactus, String of pearls.
Planning road trip to lake house (~1.5 hrs away). Dad used Google Maps for uncle's lake house visit during family reunion last month.
